entry.title: 2026 Tesla Model Y PREMIUM
entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2026 Tesla Model Y PREMIUM offered in Diamond Black will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Convenience

  • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.

Safety and Security

  • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.
  • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.
  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
Other notable features: Napleton Crystal Lake Buick GMC is proud to serve customers in communities throughout Northern Chicago & Northeastern Illinois. Give us a call at 815-219-4358 or stop by to test drive your new car, truck, or SUV today! 6305 Northwest Highway Crystal Lake IL 60014 **Napleton Autos Online Pricing Disclaimer Certified Pre-Owned and used inventory is offered for sale to the public. Pricing indicated as "The Napleton Price" includes all applicable dealer discounts and/or manufacturer's incentives, and does not include any tax, title, doc fee, license, optional equipment costs and/or dealer installed add-on items selected by the customer at the time of sale. Destination charges may vary by model and are included in pricing. All pricing is subject to change without notice. Napleton Auto Group utilizes this website, as well as 3rd party websites, to market and advertise our inventory online. All pricing is subject to the availability of that exact vehicle, as indicated by the Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) and dealer stock number. The pricing reflected on this website, www.napleton.autos, represents the most current and accurate pricing for Napleton Auto Group. In the event of a discrepancy in pricing between this website and any 3rd party website, this website will be considered the most current and accurate price and supersedes any and all other advertised prices. While great effort is made to ensure the accuracy of the information on this site, errors do occur, so please verify all information with a Napleton Auto Group Client Advisor.

We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2025 GMC Acadia AWD AT4 offered in Ebony Twilight Metallic will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Preferred Equipment Group 4SB

    Floor Liner Package ($350 value)

    • 1st and 2nd Row All-Weather Floor Liner
    • 3rd Row All-Weather Floor Liner

    Safety and Security

    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Rear camera with washer - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. Even if there are sloppy conditions, the washer keeps the camera's view clean. Rear camera with washer is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe
    • Rear collision mitigation - It has your back. Rear collision mitigation uses sensors to monitor the area behind you. If it senses an impending crash, it activates certain features to help prevent a collision or reduce the severity of it. Put your worries behind you with rear collision mitigation.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

This 2024 Volvo V60 Cross Country Plus offered in Crystal White Metallic will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Safety and Security

  • Active blind spot system - Protect your blind side. You checked the mirror, looked over your shoulder and still nearly collided with the car next to you. An active blind spot system not only alerts you to the presence of a vehicle to your sides or rear but helps prevent you from making an unsafe lane change. Replace fear and uncertainty with the confidence and safety of the Active blind spot system.
  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.
  • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.

  • Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system. Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road.

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

Now with hands-off cruise control simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles with minimal steering input from you. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-off cruise control.

  • Power Rear Windows with Express Down

  • Manual Tilt-Wheel and Telescoping Steering Column

  • 2 type-C Charge-Only Rear USB Ports
  • 2 Charge/data USB Ports
  • OnStar Services Capable
  • LED Cargo Area Lighting
  • Steering Wheel Audio Controls
  • 6-Speaker Audio System Feature
  • Theft Deterrent System (unauthorized Entry)
  • HD Rear Vision Camera
  • Front Frame-Mounted Black Recovery Hooks
  • Wi-Fi Hotspot Capable
  • Trailering Package

Preferred Package

  • Power Sliding Rear Window with Rear Defogger
  • Rear Wheelhouse Liners
  • Adaptive Cruise Control
  • Hitch View
  • In-Vehicle Trailering System App
  • Universal Home Remote
  • Premium Bose 7-Speaker Sound System

Sierra Safety Plus Package

  • High Gloss Black Mirror Caps
  • Trailer Camera Provisions
  • Perimeter Lighting
  • Ultrasonic Front and Rear Park Assist
  • Rear Cross Traffic Braking
  • Rear Pedestrian Detection
  • Trailer Side Blind Zone Alert
  • HD Surround Vision

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: ENGINE, 5.3L ECOTEC3 V8, DOWNPOUR METALLIC Napleton Crystal Lake Buick GMC is proud to serve customers in communities throughout Northern Chicago & Northeastern Illinois. Preferred Package

  • Power Sliding Rear Window with Rear Defogger

  • Rear Pedestrian Detection

  • HD Surround Vision

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring

  • Power Front Windows with Passenger Express Down
  • Power Rear Windows with Express Down

  • Power Front Windows with Driver Express Up/down
  • Color-Keyed Carpeting Floor Covering

  • Integrated Trailer Brake Controller
  • 120-Volt Interior Power Outlet
  • Manual Tilt-Wheel and Telescoping Steering Column
  • Single Speed Transfer Case
  • GMC Pro Safety
  • Cloth Rear Seat with Storage Package
  • SiriusXM with 360L Trial Subscription
  • 2 type-C Charge-Only Rear USB Ports
  • 2 Charge/data USB Ports
  • OnStar Services Capable
  • LED Cargo Area Lighting
  • Steering Wheel Audio Controls
  • 6-Speaker Audio System Feature
  • Theft Deterrent System (unauthorized Entry)
  • HD Rear Vision Camera
  • Front Frame-Mounted Black Recovery Hooks
  • Wi-Fi Hotspot Capable
  • Trailering Package

Preferred Package

  • Power Sliding Rear Window with Rear Defogger
  • Rear Wheelhouse Liners
  • Adaptive Cruise Control
  • Hitch View
  • In-Vehicle Trailering System App
  • Universal Home Remote
  • Premium Bose 7-Speaker Sound System

Sierra Safety Plus Package

  • High Gloss Black Mirror Caps
  • Trailer Camera Provisions
  • Perimeter Lighting
  • Ultrasonic Front and Rear Park Assist
  • Rear Cross Traffic Braking
  • Rear Pedestrian Detection
  • Trailer Side Blind Zone Alert
  • HD Surround Vision

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

(3266 KG), REAR AXLE, 3.23 RATIO, WHEELS, 20" X 9" (50.8 CM X 22.9 CM) 6-SPOKE HIGH GLOSS BLACK PAINTED ALUMINUM, TIRES, 275/60R20SL ALL-TERRAIN, BLACKWALL, ONYX BLACK, SEATS, FRONT BUCKET, JET BLACK, LEATHER-APPOINTED FRONT SEAT TRIM, AUDIO SYSTEM, 13.4" DIAGONAL PREMIUM GMC INFOTAINMENT SYSTEM WITH GOOGLE BUILT IN APPS SUCH AS NAVIGATION AND VOICE ASSISTANCE, INCLUDES COLOR TOUCH-SCREEN, MULTI-TOUCH DISPLAY, AM/FM STEREO, ELEVATION PREMIUM PACKAGE, X31 OFF-ROAD AND PROTECTION PACKAGE, PREFERRED PACKAGE, X31 OFF-ROAD PACKAGE, SIERRA SAFETY PLUS PACKAGE, AIR FILTER, HEAVY-DUTY, ENGINE BLOCK HEATER, ELECTRONIC PRECISION SHIFT AND STEERING COLUMN PADDLE SHIFTERS, HILL DESCENT CONTROL, TRANSFER CASE, TWO-SPEED, ELECTRONIC AUTOTRAC, SUSPENSION, OFF-ROAD, SKID PLATES, EXHAUST, DUAL SYSTEM, WHEELHOUSE LINERS, REAR, SUNROOF, POWER, LPO, BLACK TUBULAR ASSIST STEPS, 6" RECTANGULAR, LPO, FRONT AND REAR MOLDED SPLASH GUARDS, BLACK, LIGHTING, PERIMETER, MIRROR CAPS, HIGH GLOSS BLACK, WINDOW, POWER, REAR SLIDING WITH REAR DEFOGGER, LICENSE PLATE KIT, FRONT, TAILGATE, GMC MULTIPRO TAILGATE, BEDLINER, SPRAY-ON, BOSE SOUND SYSTEM, PREMIUM 7-SPEAKER SYSTEM, SEAT, UP-LEVEL REAR WITH STORAGE PACKAGE, 60/40 FOLDING BENCH, CENTER CONSOLE, FLOOR-MOUNTED, LPO, ALL-WEATHER FLOOR LINER, 1ST AND 2ND ROWS, IN-VEHICLE TRAILERING APP, UNIVERSAL HOME REMOTE, ADAPTIVE CRUISE CONTROL, WIRELESS CHARGING, USB PORTS, 2, CHARGE/DATA PORTS LOCATED INSIDE CENTER CONSOLE, HITCH VIEW, HD SURROUND VISION, TRAILER CAMERA PROVISIONS AND TRAILER VIEWING SOFTWARE, FRONT AND REAR PARK ASSIST, ULTRASONIC, TRAILER SIDE BLIND ZONE ALERT, REAR CROSS TRAFFIC BRAKING, REAR PEDESTRIAN ALERT Napleton Crystal Lake Buick GMC is proud to serve customers in communities throughout Northern Chicago & Northeastern Illinois. Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.   • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.

Technology and Telematics

  • Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system. Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road.
  • Apple CarPlay Compatibility smart device wireless mirroring
Other notable features: WHEELS: 19" X 7.5" Y-SPOKE (STYLE 693), DARK GRAPHITE METALLIC, BLACK, SENSATEC UPHOLSTERY, DRIVING ASSISTANCE PROFESSIONAL PACKAGE, PARKING ASSISTANCE PACKAGE, CONVENIENCE PACKAGE, PANORAMIC MOONROOF, HEATED FRONT SEATS, HEATED STEERING WHEEL, COMFORT ACCESS KEYLESS ENTRY, AMBIENT LIGHTING Napleton Crystal Lake Buick GMC is proud to serve customers in communities throughout Northern Chicago & Northeastern Illinois. Give us a call at 815-219-4358 or stop by to test drive your new car, truck, or SUV today! 6305 Northwest Highway Crystal Lake IL 60014 **Napleton Autos Online Pricing Disclaimer Certified Pre-Owned and used inventory is offered for sale to the public. Pricing indicated as "The Napleton Price" includes all applicable dealer discounts and/or manufacturer's incentives, and does not include any tax, title, doc fee, license, optional equipment costs and/or dealer installed add-on items selected by the customer at the time of sale. Destination charges may vary by model and are included in pricing. All pricing is subject to change without notice. Napleton Auto Group utilizes this website, as well as 3rd party websites, to market and advertise our inventory online. This 2024 Chevrolet Trailblazer LT offered in Summit White will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

LT Cold Weather Package ($595 value)

  • Heated Driver and Front Passenger Seats
  • Wrapped Steering Wheel
  • Heated Steering Wheel
  • Satin Silver and Chrome Wrapped Shift Knob

Convenience Package ($1,495 value)

  • 8-Way Power Driver Seat Adjuster
  • 2-Way Power Driver Lumbar Seat Adjuster
  • Single-Zone Auto Climate Control Air Conditioning
  • Rear Center Armrest
  • Inside Rearview Auto-Dimming Mirror
  • Driver and Front Passenger Illuminated Vanity Mirrors
  • Wireless Charging
  • 120-Volt Power Outlet
  • Power Liftgate
  • 1 type-A and 1 type-C USB Charging-Only Ports

Driver Confidence Package ($395 value)

  • Rear Park Assist
  • Rear Cross Traffic Alert
  • Lane Change Alert with Side Blind Zone Alert

Preferred Equipment Group 1LT

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
    • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera with washer - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. Even if there are sloppy conditions, the washer keeps the camera's view clean. Rear camera with washer is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe

Technology and Telematics

  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: ENGINE, 2.0L TURBO, 4-CYLINDER, SIDI, EBONY TWILIGHT METALLIC Napleton Crystal Lake Buick GMC is proud to serve customers in communities throughout Northern Chicago & Northeastern Illinois.     • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. This 2019 INFINITI QX50 LUXE offered in Hermosa Blue will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Navigation Package ($700 value)

  • INFINITI InTouch with Navigation and InTouch Services

Heated Seats ($550 value)

  • Includes heated front seats.

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Predictive brake assist - Be prepared for your big brake. Predictive brake assist monitors the available distance in front of you compared to your vehicles speed. If your speed exceeds the required distance to stop short of a collision, it readies your brakes to apply maximum stopping force when you use them. Predictive brake assist helps see to it that you stop.

Technology and Telematics

  • Selective Internet access - a more focused delivery. Selective internet access allows you to tailor the features for your feed, such as sports scores, local news, or current weather. When it comes to getting what you want, selective internet access is a net gain.

entry.title: 2024 Chevrolet Traverse AWD RS
entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2024 Chevrolet Traverse AWD RS offered in Mosaic Black Metallic will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Preferred Equipment Group 2RS

    Floor Liner Package ($275 value)

    • 1st and 2nd Row All-Weather Floor Liners
    • 3rd Row All-Weather Floor Liner

    Convenience

    • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Hands-off cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now with hands-off cruise control simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles with minimal steering input from you. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-off cruise control.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
    Other notable features: EMISSIONS, FEDERAL REQUIREMENTS, ENGINE, 2.5L TURBO DOHC SIDI WITH VARIABLE VALVE TIMING (VVT), TRANSMISSION, 8-SPEED AUTOMATIC, WHEELS, 22" (55.9 CM) HIGH GLOSS BLACK PAINTED ALUMINUM, MOSAIC BLACK METALLIC, SEATS, FRONT BUCKET, JET BLACK WITH TORCH RED ACCENTS, PERFORATED LEATHER-APPOINTED SEAT TRIM, AUDIO SYSTEM, 17.7" DIAGONAL ADVANCED COLOR HIGH-CONTRAST LCD DISPLAY, LPO, FLOOR LINER PACKAGE, NOT EQUIPPED WITH HEATED WIPER PARK, ORNAMENTATION, NAMEPLATE, RS, LPO, ALL-WEATHER FLOOR LINERS, FIRST AND SECOND ROW, LPO, ALL-WEATHER FLOOR LINER, THIRD ROW Napleton Crystal Lake Buick GMC is proud to serve customers in communities throughout Northern Chicago & Northeastern Illinois. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.

Safety and Security

Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.

Technology and Telematics

  • Wireless Apple CarPlay/Wireless Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: CRYSTAL BLACK PEARL, BLACK, LEATHER SEAT TRIM Napleton Crystal Lake Buick GMC is proud to serve customers in communities throughout Northern Chicago & Northeastern Illinois. Safety and Security

With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.
  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.

Technology and Telematics

  • Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system. Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road.

entry.title: 2026 GMC Terrain AWD Elevation
entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2026 GMC Terrain AWD Elevation offered in Sterling Metallic will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

Technology and Telematics

  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: ENGINE, 1.5L TURBO DOHC 4-CYLINDER, SIDI, VVT, STERLING METALLIC Napleton Crystal Lake Buick GMC is proud to serve customers in communities throughout Northern Chicago & Northeastern Illinois. entry.title: 2022 Hyundai Venue Limited
entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2022 Hyundai Venue Limited offered in Galactic Gray will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Comfort

  • Heated driver and front passenger seat cushions - That's hot. Heated driver and front passenger seat cushions provide more targeted warmth so you can get comfortable quicker in cold weather. If you have lower body pain, you might also be soothed by the heat while you drive. No matter the weather, find comfort in heated driver and front passenger seat cushions.

Convenience

  • Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.

Safety and Security

  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.

Technology and Telematics

  • Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system. Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road.
Other notable features: OPTION GROUP 01, BLACK, CLOTH SEAT TRIM, REAR SEAT CUP HOLDER, CARPETED FLOOR MATS, CARGO TRAY, CROSS RAILS Napleton Crystal Lake Buick GMC is proud to serve customers in communities throughout Northern Chicago & Northeastern Illinois.       • Includes 8-way power driver's seat with power adjustable lumbar support, black leather RECARO seats with Miko-Dinamica inserts and RS logo, heated mirrors, heated front seats, heated three point steering wheel, voice-activated touch-screen navigation system with SiriusXM Traffic and Travel Link with 5-year prepaid subscription (service not available in Alaska or Hawaii).

      Comfort

      • Heated steering wheel - A warm touch. Trying to drive with bulky winter gloves on isn't always easy. Keep your hands warm in cold temperatures so you can ditch the mitts and get a firm grip with this heated steering wheel.

This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.

      • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
      • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.

      Technology and Telematics

      • Selective Internet access - a more focused delivery. Selective internet access allows you to tailor the features for your feed, such as sports scores, local news, or current weather. When it comes to getting what you want, selective internet access is a net gain.

    • Keyfob engine start control - Get an early start. Remotely start your vehicle's engine from the key fob, ensuring your ride is ready to go when you get in. Now you can stay comfortable inside while your vehicle gets comfortable outside, thanks to Keyfob engine start control.

    Safety and Security

    • Blind spot warning - Protect your blind side. You checked the mirror, looked over your shoulder and still nearly collided with the car next to you. Blind spot warning alerts you to the presence of a vehicle to your sides or rear so you know if you're about to make an unsafe lane change. Replace fear and uncertainty with confidence and safety with blind spot warning.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Wireless Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.

    Convenience

    • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.     • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

entry.title: 2026 Buick Encore GX Sport Touring
entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2026 Buick Encore GX Sport Touring offered in Ocean Blue Metallic will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Comfort Package ($995 value)

  • 8-Way Power Driver Seat Adjuster
  • 2-Way Power Driver Lumbar Control
  • Flat-Folding Front Passenger Seatback
  • Rear Center Armrest
  • Heated Driver and Front Passenger Seats
  • Heated Steering Wheel

Preferred Equipment Group 1SD

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
    • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
    Other notable features: EMISSIONS, FEDERAL REQUIREMENTS, ENGINE, ECOTEC 1.3L TURBO, TRANSMISSION, 9-SPEED AUTOMATIC, 9T4X, GEN 1, AXLE, 3.17 FINAL DRIVE RATIO, WHEELS, 18" (45.7 CM) GLOSS BLACK ALUMINUM, TIRES, 225/55R18 ALL-SEASON, BLACKWALL, OCEAN BLUE METALLIC, SEATS, FRONT BUCKET, EBONY SEATS AND INTERIOR WITH SANTORINI BLUE STITCHING, LEATHERETTE SEAT TRIM, AUDIO SYSTEM, 11" DIAGONAL HD COLOR TOUCHSCREEN, AM/FM STEREO., COMFORT PACKAGE, MECHANICAL JACK WITH TOOLS, TIRE, COMPACT SPARE 16" (40.3 CM), LICENSE PLATE BRACKET, FRONT, SEAT ADJUSTER, DRIVER 8-WAY POWER, SEAT ADJUSTER, 2-WAY POWER DRIVER LUMBAR CONTROL, SEATS, HEATED DRIVER AND FRONT PASSENGER, SEATBACK, FRONT PASSENGER FLAT-FOLDING, ARMREST, REAR CENTER, LPO, ALL-WEATHER FLOOR LINERS, STEERING WHEEL, HEATED Napleton Crystal Lake Buick GMC is proud to serve customers in communities throughout Northern Chicago & Northeastern Illinois.
